title: Omnixerio GUI Library
description: Adds utilities to make GUI for developers.
body:
# Ultreon GUI Library
*Adds utilities to make GUI for developers.*  
<u>**NOTE THAT ALPHA AND BETA VERSIONS MAY**</u>  
<u>**INCLUDE GAME BREAKING BUGS AND CRASHES**</u>  

 

## Features
 * Utility for creating fullscreen GUIs with something to render in the background.
 * Utility for creating a GUI with rows of widgets.
 * Theming of GUIs, adding vanilla, light, dark and mixed themes.

## Source code
The source code is on github: [Ultreon / gui-library](https://github.com/Ultreon/gui-library)

## Links
[[Discord]](https://discord.gg/WePT9v2CmQ) [[Issues]](https://github.com/Ultreon/gui-library/issues) [[Source Code]](https://github.com/Ultreon/gui-library)
